summary: Interactive birthday web app for Kashaf with password protection, puzzle, and surprise reveals
architectural_notes: Single-page app with multi-stage flow using JavaScript page transitions
Purple gradient theme (#6a0dad to #b19cd9) with Comic Sans MS font
CSS animations for bounce effect on gift emoji

existing_features.title: Create a password-protected entry page that accepts the code '23023006' and displays error message 'Wrong code 😭 Try again!' for incorrect attempts

Create a math puzzle page asking 'What is 2 + 3 + 0 + 2 + 3 + 0 + 0 + 6 ?' with answer validation for '16', showing success message 'Correctttt 💜 She is the BESTTTT!' and error message 'Nooo sillyyy 😂 Try again!'

Create an interactive gift page with a clickable animated gift emoji (🎁) that bounces continuously and reveals a humorous message when clicked: 'The gift is not chocolate 🍫, Not diamonds 💎, Not money 💸, It's a lifetime free subscription of MY DRAMA 🤭💜, And unlimited hugs (terms & conditions apply 😂)'

Create a birthday celebration page displaying '🎉 HAPPY BIRTHDAY KASHAF 🎉' with messages 'You are the best person in the world 💜', 'I love you soooo much 🥺', 'From Shamaaim 💕' and a button to proceed to the next page

Create a final message page with heading '💌 A Special Message' displaying heartfelt messages: 'I really enjoyed your company 💜', 'I truly want to be your safe place 🤍', 'I want to be your very close friend forever ✨', 'You mean so much to me, more than you know 🥹', 'Stay magical, my purple queen 👑💜'

Apply a whimsical purple gradient design theme using Comic Sans MS font, purple gradient background (from #6a0dad to #b19cd9), white text, rounded buttons with light purple (#d8b4f8) background that darken on hover (#c084fc), and semi-transparent white boxes for content sections

new_feature_requests.summary: Interactive gift reveal page with click animation
Birthday message page with personalized content
Final special message page with heartfelt content
